crc32c.description: Checksum for detecting data corruption during storage or transfer

generation.description: Object's version number for managing lifecycle and updates

id.description: Unique identifier for the storage object within the bucket

md5hash.description: Hash for ensuring object content integrity and security

media_link.description: Direct URL for downloading or streaming the object data

output_name.description: Label used to identify the object in operations or logs

self_link.description: Endpoint for performing API actions on the object
